title: Featured in Artful Blogging!
excerpt: SO excited to share that I have been featured in the beautiful magazine, Artful Blogging . I definitely have the most colorful pages in the gorgeous publication. So many other inspiring artists are featured throughout and the photos are stunning.…
body:
SO excited to share that I have been featured in the beautiful magazine, Artful Blogging. I definitely have the most colorful pages in the gorgeous publication. So many other inspiring artists are featured throughout and the photos are stunning. It's hard to believe I have been sharing random bits of my life for 10 years now. The piece I wrote is called A Little Slice of Life, and is shared from pages 72-79. I've learned a lot along this journey and hope you feel inspired after reading my story in the Autumn 2017 issue of Artful Blogging. 

Photo taken at the Color Factory by Lish Creative.
